name: read-this-later
title: Read This Later
description: Browse your saved articles and save the current browser tab.
author: shearm

commands.name: list-unread
commands.title: Show Unread Links
commands.subtitle: Read This Later
commands.description: Browse your unread saved articles and open them in your browser

commands.name: save-current-tab
commands.title: Save Current Tab
commands.subtitle: Read This Later
commands.description: Save the URL of the frontmost browser tab to Read This Later

preferences.name: syncToken
preferences.title: Sync Token
preferences.description: Bearer token for the Read Later sync service (the same token your Mac/iOS app uses).
